label: Hierarchy Selector
description: Org → Client → Strategy selector strip for scoping the book order entry form.

0.6.note: orgsLoading spinner via useOrganizationsList() isLoading flag.

0.7.note: Org empty state shows 'No organizations'; strategy always shows 'Manual (unlinked)'.

0.8.note: orgsError guard returns rose-500 error message.

l0.notes: All 9 checks pass. Loading/error states added in prior agent pass.

1.1.note: Orgs and strategies via useBookTradeData() — no inline fetch.

1.2.note: book-data-context calls useGlobalScope() and syncs orgId/clientId/strategyId via useEffect.

1.6.note: Empty scope arrays leave form state unchanged (no forced reset).

1.7.note: Widget has no reference data of its own; orgs from API, strategies from lib/strategy-registry.

l1.notes: Scope sync works via useEffect in book-data-context.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab and f9f29ea (65 automated tests).

3.1.note: Applies to all modes — pure UI selector, mode-agnostic. Selectors should be read-only in batch mode.

3.2.note: Pure control bar — no data filtered by mode.

3.3.note: Human must verify selectors are disabled or read-only in batch mode.

3.4.note: Control bar itself is not responsible for batch indicator — layout handles it.

3.5.note: Paper mode: selectors should remain active (same org/client/strategy in paper). No blocking issue.

3.6.note: No WebSocket or interval in this widget.

l3.notes: Agent checks 3.1/3.2/3.5/3.6 done. 3.3 human verification needed.

4.1.note: All onValueChange handlers wired (setOrgId, setClientId, setStrategyId). No empty onClick.

4.3.note: Human must verify all three selectors (Org, Client, Strategy) work and cascade correctly.

4.4.note: Human must verify selecting an org correctly narrows context data.

4.8.note: Human must verify flex-wrap layout at small widths.

5.1.note: Serves all strategies via org/client/strategy scoping. Strategy selector shows live and paper strategies from registry.

l5.notes: Pure scoping widget — not strategy-specific. Human walkthrough 5.2-5.6 deferred.

l6.notes: L1.5 harness spec: 8 tests covering render (testid mount, labels, loading branch, error branch, empty-org branch), Client input wiring to setClientId, and bound clientId reflection. See tests/widgets/book/book-hierarchy-bar.test.tsx

7.4.note: BookHierarchyBarWidget PascalCase. File kebab-case. useBookTradeData camelCase.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: No useEffect/useMemo/useCallback in this widget. Event handlers are inline onChange — acceptable for simple setter calls.

8.1.note: text-[10px] on assetClass span replaced with text-caption (2026-04-21).

8.3.note: Uses Input, Select, SelectTrigger/Content/Item from components/ui.

8.4.note: Agent: no img without alt, inputs have adjacent label elements. No interactive divs. Human: keyboard + screen-reader pass needed.

8.5.note: Human must verify at minW=6, minH=1 — flex-wrap may clip at narrow widths.

l8.notes: One L8.1 fix applied. Remaining checks need human verification.

keepSeparate.rationale: Hierarchy selector strip is a distinct layout primitive — it occupies a dedicated 1-row band and scopes all sibling book widgets. Merging into the order form would make the form too wide and remove the ability to reposition the selector independently.

relationships.notes: Acts as a master scope controller for the entire book tab. All other book widgets consume scope values set here via shared book-data-context.

dataContract.notes: Organizations list from useOrganizationsList() REST hook. Strategies from static STRATEGIES registry (lib/strategy-registry). Production: REST org list + strategy registry endpoint.

gaps: Client field is a free-text Input — no autocomplete or validation against actual client IDs
Strategy selector only shows live/paper strategies — draft/archived not visible
coverage.notes: Scope selector is asset-class-agnostic. Filters apply to all strategy types.

knownIssues.note: Client field is a free-text Input — no validation, no autocomplete against a client registry. Any string is accepted and flows through handleSubmit.client_id. Needs a client-registry lookup or at minimum a scope-store-backed typeahead.

findings.description: book-hierarchy-bar-widget.tsx:87 — text-[10px] on assetClass span in strategy dropdown
book-hierarchy-bar-widget.tsx — ~8 user-visible strings (labels, placeholders, error message). No i18n applied.
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: Client Input is free-text; no registry validation. Accepts empty string and arbitrary values which flow into handleSubmit as client_id.
findings.proposedFix: Replace Input with a Combobox wired to a client registry hook (proposed: useClientsList() scoped by orgId). Fall back to free text only if registry lookup fails, with a visual 'unverified' badge.
